project_area: Climate-resilient playgrounds and stormwater management infrastructure
demographic_requirements: Primarily serves children and families in Hoboken, New Jersey, with a focus on flood-prone areas and climate adaptation education
eligibility_summary: The project was funded through infrastructure replacement grants, including approximately $10 million from the Federal Emergency Management Agency (FEMA). Eligibility is not explicitly detailed in the text, but the project targets municipal infrastructure improvements in Hoboken, NJ, with a focus on climate resilience and community benefit.
